calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Property To Be Titled In Name Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Terry J. Kent for Rome S. Bautista and Yanina B. Mendoza, Petitioners/Co-Trustees (via Zoom).

The court noted no issue with the Heggstad aspect of the petition but expressed hesitation regarding issuing an order determining title to Yan Hua Yu. Mr. Kent explained that his intent was to avoid potential complications with county assessors aggressively reassessing property upon transfer.

The court opted to take the petition under submission with intent grant as to the Heggstad portion of the petition, with the order issued nunc pro tunc to the appropriate date. Mr. Kent indicated that he had sent in a proposed order for consideration.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Determining Property To Be Titled In Name Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Continued To Jan-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
